summary:
Flumazenil is the specific benzodiazepine antagonist used clinically to reverse excessive sedation or respiratory depression caused by benzodiazepines. It works by competitively blocking the binding site at the GABA_A receptor complex where benzodiazepines exert their effect.  

$\boxed{\text{A}}$
formatted_summary:
agent2 (Round 1 summarized): Flumazenil is the specific benzodiazepine antagonist used clinically to reverse excessive sedation or respiratory depression caused by benzodiazepines. It works by competitively blocking the binding site at the GABA_A receptor complex where benzodiazepines exert their effect.  

$\boxed{\text{A}}$. Answer choice: B
